  2. Labels
  3. Custom Roll Labels & Custom Sticker Rolls
  4. Custom Clear Waterproof Roll Labels

Custom Clear Waterproof Roll Labels

Clear waterproof roll labels are all about providing a long-lasting, clean presentation for your product. With versatility in mind, our clear labels are designed to offer both form and function, allowing for these labels to seamlessly stick all while providing that "no label" look. We print our clear roll labels on a durable, waterproof material that is made to resist oil, moisture, and overall daily wear and tear, making these labels an excellent choice for food and beverage containers, all the way to bath and beauty products. The possibilities are practically endless, ensuring that whatever you're labeling grabs all the attention while increasing your products overall visibility! Pick a shape below and begin customizing your perfect label!

 

 

Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels
View Product
Clear Oval Waterproof Roll Labels
View Product
Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels
View Product
Clear Square Waterproof Roll Labels
View Product

More About Custom Clear Waterproof Roll Labels 

Clear waterproof roll labels are more than just your average label; they offer a sleek yet effective way to upgrade your packaging! These labels are designed to provide you with a "no label" look that allows for your product to still be the main attraction without a cost at performance. Due to the clear nature of these labels, they are ideal for things such as food jars, cosmetics, drink bottles, or really anything you'd like to label! These labels are made with durability in mind, as they are waterproof, oil-resistant, and crafted with non-toxic materials, allowing for improved versatility all while highlighting your product front and center.

 

Customer Reviews ... Reviews

★★★★★

Don't take our word for it! See what others are saying.

See Our Reviews More Reviews

Why Choose Decals.com?

Customer Service

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

Made in the USA

All of our products are proudly made and manufactured here in the USA!

 

Fast Turnaround

Standard turnaround time ships your product within three business days.

Track Your Order

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary live order tracking system.

Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

Product Information

What's the difference between your clear and white waterproof roll labels?

Clear provides you with a seamless, "no-label" look, while white offers a solid, opaque background that is perfect for more colorful designs. 

What finishing options are available for your clear waterproof roll labels?

We currently offer two finishing styles. Gloss for a more vibrant, shiny look, and matte that provides a sleek, pen-receptive surface allowing for handwritten details. 

How are your clear waterproof roll labels delivered? 

We deliver your labels on rolls, allowing for easy storage options and easy application! The amount you order WILL influence the size of the roll.

Is there an order minimum?

Yes, for our clear roll labels there is a minimum order amount of 500.

Are there bulk discounts on your clear waterproof roll labels?

Yes! The more you order, the more you'll save! 

Can I write on my label?

Yes, you can; however, if that is the main purpose, we recommend that you select the "matte" finishing option due to it being pen-friendly. 

Order Custom Clear Waterproof Roll Labels
